series_metadata.series_description: Printing/purchase documents are combined with original copies of packing lists and receiving documents that provide order status verification on arriving products. Electronic records are maintained through network supported applications. Original documents are stored at Lebanon Correctional facility.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain for 2 fiscal years, plus current fiscal year, then destroy; or destroy upon authorization resulting from the completion of an audit. ; Electronic: Receiving database (MS Access) information is maintained for 3 fiscal years and until no longer of administrative value., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
